message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Team Member" as TM
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as CTUI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as CTC
participant ":DataManagement" as DM
participant "projectStore : ProjectStore" as PS
participant "project : Project" as P

TM -> CTUI: 1 Starts the Task creation in User Story
activate CTUI
CTUI --> TM: 2 request the project code
TM -> CTUI: 3 Inserts the project code
activate CTUI
CTUI --> TM: 4 request sprint id
TM -> CTUI: 5 Inserts the sprint id
activate CTUI
CTUI --> TM: 6 request user story id
TM -> CTUI: 7 Inserts the user story id
activate CTUI
CTUI --> TM: 8 request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
TM -> CTUI: 9 Inserts request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
activate CTUI
CTUI -> CTC: 10 createTaskInUserStory(code, sprintID, userStoryID, name, description, type, startDate, endDate)
activate CTC
CTC -> DM: 11 projectStore = getProjectStore()
activate DM
DM --> CTC: 12 projectStore
deactivate DM
CTC -> PS: 13 project = getProjectByCode(code)
activate PS
PS --> CTC: 14 project
deactivate PS
CTC -> P: 15 getSprintByID(sprintID)
activate P
P --> CTC: 16 true
deactivate P
CTC --> TM: 17 true
deactivate CTC
CTUI --> TM: 18 Task created successfully
deactivate CTUI

note right of P
ref
TaskCreationInUserStory
end note

@enduml
